texto: I don't have a life of my own. I've put myself and my life at the service of the people. If necessity dictates I run, I run.. go to jail, I go to jail.. die, I die.My private aspirations are exactly the general aspirations of the people.
explicacao: Citação de Yusuf Idris sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't have a life of my own. I've put myself and my life at the service of the people. If neces…” articula reflexao, revolution, sacrifice em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como sacrifice.
